title: polygala turcica
intro: Polygala turcica, also known as Turkish milkwort, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Polygalaceae, native to the mountainous regions of Turkey. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala turcica include its potential to support immune function, reduce stress, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Polygala turcica can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
